series_metadata.series_title: OCM OWC NERR Research and Monitoring Files
series_metadata.series_description: The Office of Coastal Management (OCM) maintains Old Woman Creek (OWC) National Estuarine Research Reserve (NERR) Research and Monitoring files which contain documents that record data, observations, and reports on research and monitoring activities conducted by or in collaboration with OWC NERR. They may contain copies of raw and/or summary data, project summaries/reports/publications, other correspondence, and other documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: approved through an approved QA/QC process
